name: Hootsuite Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Enterprise
product_overview_description:
Hootsuite is a veteran in the social media management space. With its comprehensive suite of features, the platform allows businesses to schedule posts, analyze performance, and monitor their social presence across multiple channels. As one of the more established tools on the market, Hootsuite has long been a go-to option for social media teams.

Source: Hootsuite

Core Features

  • Customizable analytics reports with powerful visualizations
  • White-label reporting capabilities for agencies and resellers
  • AI-powered content generator to spark fresh ideas
  • Social listening tools to monitor brand mentions and relevant hashtags
  • Trend analysis across different social platforms

What’s great

✅Highly customizable content and reporting features

✅Excellent customer support

✅Consistently surfacing trending topics and fresh content suggestions

✅Social listening capabilities allow you to stay on top of your brand's online mentions

What’s not great

❌Occasional image quality issues when scheduling posts

❌Site updates can sometimes cause minor scheduling errors

❌Reseller support is very limited

Pricing

Hootsuite doesn’t offer monthly billing plans. The annualized plan start at $99 per month for professional tier. This one is limited to only one user and 10 social accounts. There’s a 30-day free trial available to customers. The next is the team tier which is $249 per month when billed annually. They have also have a custom enterprise pricing plan.
